vs_past.note: 1 V→I regression on scenario_3 due to upstream provider (LiteLLM/Gemini) BadRequestError on turns 2-5; not a Reyn-side behavioral regression. Other 6 scenarios held V, including the G12 attractor-detection scenario (scenario_4 repetitive_context_bloat) which ran all 6 turns with non-empty substantive replies.

scenarios.notes: Final turn explicitly named the principle 'OS as the Unchanging Core' and the 'strict separation of concerns' with the LLM constrained to a closed set of candidate transitions (P4/P7 equivalent). Turn 4 reused the architecture diagram introduced in earlier turns.

Yaml has no explicit rubric / artifacts / events.must_emit. Turn 2 hit a transient `litellm.ServiceUnavailableError` (provider 503-class) but the agent recovered and turns 3-6 returned coherent (if knowledge-limited) text. No empty-stop on any turn.

Turn 1 produced a substantive LangGraph multi-agent answer. Turns 2-5 all returned `router failed: [bad request] litellm.BadRequestError ... GeminiException BadRequestError - { • check the prompt / model name / context size`. Upstream provider env failure (likely prompt-validation / content-policy / model-id mismatch from LiteLLM proxy), not a Reyn behavioral regression. Marked I per worker brief (env reason).

Primary attractor-detection scenario per yaml comment. All 6 turns returned substantive replies; turn 6 (deliberate re-confirm pattern, classic G12 Pattern E trigger) produced a full skill list, no empty-stop.
Final turn produced a minimal async producer-consumer using asyncio.Queue with producer/consumer coroutines, None sentinel for shutdown, and queue.task_done() — all three rubric items satisfied.

Yaml has no explicit rubric. Agent did not autonomously read ADRs from disk (it lacks an unguided file-read tool in this surface) but all 5 turns returned coherent, on-topic, non-empty replies. No empty-stop. Note: per worker brief verdict scoping, `covers: control-ir-ops/file` is metadata, not verdict criteria.
Non-Reyn distributed-systems chain across 5 turns. All turns substantive, final turn enumerated repair strategies (LWW, application-specific, etc.) building on prior CAP/eventual-consistency context.

new_findings.summary: scenario_3 turns 2-5 hit upstream LiteLLM/Gemini BadRequestError. Single-occurrence in this worker (N=1); not reproducible without rerun. Hypothesis: prompt-validation or context-size threshold on the LiteLLM proxy. Not a Reyn-layer regression.
scenario_2 turn 2 hit a single litellm.ServiceUnavailableError (503-class) but recovered cleanly on turns 3-6. No fix action required; documented for cross-worker dedup.

G12 Pattern E (= context-bloat empty-stop) did NOT trigger on scenario_4 in this worker run, including the deliberate 6th re-confirm turn. Hypothesis confirmation pending across other B53 workers + B52 baseline (B52=7/7 V).
